  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    comms/spandsp-devel  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist

                              patch-src::tone_generate.c

  Log:
  spandsp-devel is a DSP library to support fax functions.
  Basically it implements a software fax machine to fax out or in.
  
  WWW: http://www.soft-switch.org/
  
  PR:             107871
  Submitted by:   Joe Holden <joe@joeholden.co.uk>
  Repocopy by:    marcus
